parameters.query:
UPDATE normalized_findings SET
  remediation_status = '{{ $json.status }}',
  remediation_owner = {{ $json.owner ? "'" + $json.owner + "'" : 'remediation_owner' }},
  remediation_evidence = {{ $json.evidence_of_fix ? "'" + $json.evidence_of_fix.replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : 'remediation_evidence' }},
  remediation_notes = {{ $json.notes ? "'" + $json.notes.replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : 'remediation_notes' }},
  remediation_updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}'
RETURNING id, remediation_status, severity, priority_bucket;

INSERT INTO remediation_tickets (finding_id, engagement_id, owner, status, external_ticket_id, notes)
SELECT '{{ $('Validate Update').first().json.finding_id }}',
       engagement_id,
       {{ $('Validate Update').first().json.owner ? "'" + $('Validate Update').first().json.owner + "'" : 'NULL' }},
       '{{ $('Validate Update').first().json.status }}',
       {{ $('Validate Update').first().json.external_ticket_id ? "'" + $('Validate Update').first().json.external_ticket_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
       {{ $('Validate Update').first().json.notes ? "'" + $('Validate Update').first().json.notes.replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
FROM normalized_findings WHERE id = '{{ $('Validate Update').first().json.finding_id }}'
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, entity_type, entity_id, payload)
VALUES ('remediation_updated','wf14','finding','{{ $('Validate Update').first().json.finding_id }}','{"new_status":"{{ $('Validate Update').first().json.status }}","owner":"{{ $('Validate Update').first().json.owner || '' }}"}'::jsonb);

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, finding_id: $('Validate Update').first().json.finding_id, new_status: $('Validate Update').first().json.status }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE normalized_findings SET
  remediation_status = '{{ $json.status }}',
  remediation_owner = {{ $json.owner ? "'" + $json.owner + "'" : 'remediation_owner' }},
  remediation_notes = {{ $json.notes ? "'" + $json.notes.replace(/'/g,"''") + "'" : 'remediation_notes' }},
  remediation_updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.finding_id }}';

meta.description: RECON OS WF-14: Remediation Tracker — updates finding remediation status, validates state transitions, auto-schedules retest on fixed_pending_retest. Supports bulk import from client teams.
